Write a Python function that finds all duplicate elements in a list and returns them. It should run in O(n) time complexity.

Fix this buggy binary search implementation that returns wrong results for edge cases: def binary_search(arr, target): lo, hi = 0, len(arr); while lo < hi: mid = (lo+hi)//2; if arr[mid] == target: return mid; elif arr[mid] < target: lo = mid; else: hi = mid; return -1
Implement a thread-safe singleton pattern in Python that works correctly under concurrent access.
Write a Python decorator that retries a function up to 3 times with exponential backoff if it raises an exception.
Debug this recursive fibonacci function that causes a RecursionError for large inputs and rewrite it iteratively.
Implement a LRU cache class in Python with get and put methods, both running in O(1) time.
Write a context manager in Python that times the execution of a code block and prints the duration.
Fix this merge sort implementation that fails on lists with duplicate values.
Write a Python generator function that yields all permutations of a given list without using itertools.
Implement a simple rate limiter class that allows at most N requests per second.
